title: Transport in Hungary
content: Transport in Hungary relies on several main modes, including transport by road, rail, air and water. Roads. Hungary has a total of of public roads, of which are paved (including 1481 km of motorway s, as of 2016); and are unpaved (2005 etc.): Hungarian road categories are as follows: Motorways and expressways. Hungarian motorways and expressways are part of the national road network.
